items.title: Kerley says he'll run clean at Enhanced Games
items.summary: American sprinter Fred Kerley says he will run clean at the upcoming Enhanced Games, adding that he also expects to compete at the Los Angeles Olympics in 2028.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
